name: Ascent Solar Technologies, Inc.
summary: Ascent Solar Technologies, Inc. manufactures and sells flexible, lightweight CIGS-based photovoltaic (PV) solar modules using a roll-to-roll manufacturing process on plastic substrates with proprietary monolithic integration. The company targets high-value specialty markets including space power beaming, aerospace, satellites, near-earth orbiting vehicles, fixed-wing UAVs, aquatic, and terrestrial applications where traditional rigid solar panels are unsuitable, with a focus on defense and DoD drone and space operations.

products.name: CIGS Flexible PV Modules
products.description: Thin-film copper-indium-gallium-diselenide solar modules on flexible plastic substrate with monolithic integration, offering high power-to-weight ratio for aerospace, space, and UAV markets.

partnerships.description: Ascent collaborates with strategic partners to design and develop integrated solutions for satellites, spacecraft, airships, and UAVs.
